name: DevOps AI MCP
description: Infrastructure and DevOps toolkit: Docker Compose generation, CI/CD pipeline building, log analysis, incident classification, and runbook generation. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: docker_compose_generator
tools.description: Generate a Docker Compose configuration with networking, health checks,

tools.name: cicd_pipeline_builder
tools.description: Generate a CI/CD pipeline configuration for common platforms and languages.

tools.name: log_analyzer
tools.description: Analyze log lines to extract error patterns, anomalies, status code

tools.name: incident_classifier
tools.description: Classify an incident by severity (P1-P4) and category with recommended

tools.name: runbook_generator
tools.description: Generate an operational runbook with step-by-step commands, expected
